name: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month, frequent discrepancies cause late payments. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
target_audience: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Frequent discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders.
features: Email weekly reports to procurement managers
Provide a dashboard for invoice tracking
Allow manual entry for unmatched invoices
